name: Revenant
description: The Revenant is a Maliwan SMG from a small set that always spawns with a fixed-element Maliwan barrel. This gives it unusually strong elemental damage-over-time and a higher chance to apply status effects. Fitting a Maliwan grip boosts these elemental stats further. Although it is not a high-rarity weapon, its reliable procs and potent DoT can carry you well until you find a better or rarer alternative.
notes: Related Maliwan SMGs in this fixed-element set include the Provacateur (incendiary), Venom (corrosive), Vexation (shock), and Hyperborean (cryo) in Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel. A generation bug can cause blue versions to show purple title text on the item card; with Colourblind Mode enabled it may display as [Purple] rather than [Blue]. As a result, blue and purple variants with identical parts can end up with the same stats. Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source.
